allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const d = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''d:/CODING/mypixelpage/apps/web/data/dev-world.json'', ''utf-8''\)\); console.log\(''top-level keys:'', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\(''tiles count:'', d.tiles?.length\); console.log\(''objects count:'', d.objects?.length\); console.log\(''animations count:'', d.animations?.length\); console.log\(''characterConfig:'', typeof d.characterConfig\); console.log\(''tags count:'', d.tags?.length\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const d = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''d:/CODING/mypixelpage/apps/web/data/dev-world.json'', ''utf-8''\)\); console.log\(''assets keys:'', Object.keys\(d.assets || {}\)\); console.log\(''tiles count:'', d.assets?.tiles?.length\); console.log\(''objects count:'', d.assets?.objects?.length\); console.log\(''animations count:'', d.assets?.animations?.length\); console.log\(''characterConfig:'', typeof d.assets?.characterConfig\); console.log\(''tags count:'', d.assets?.tags?.length\); console.log\(''autotileCenterVariants:'', Object.keys\(d.assets?.autotileCenterVariants || {}\).length\); console.log\(''autotileLinearMaps:'', Object.keys\(d.assets?.autotileLinearMaps || {}\).length\);")
